name: Cranberry-Orange Reslish
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Thin Skin Orange, skin removed
1/4 cup Sugar or 1/4 cup Sugar Substitute (equal to 1/4 cup sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Position knife blade in the processor.
2. Add orange and process for 1½ minutes, or until finely chopped.
3. Add remaining ingredients and pulse until fruit is finely chopped.
4. Spoon into an airtight container and chill.
